message:
fix(core): replace unsafe integer casts with try_from/wrapping for overflow safety

Harden 7 modules against integer overflow edge cases:

- degradation.rs: as u64 → u64::try_from(...).unwrap_or(u64::MAX) for durations
- memory_pressure.rs: as u64 → u64::try_from(...).unwrap_or(0) for RSS values
- recorder_storage.rs: as i64 → i64::try_from(...).unwrap_or(0) for timestamps
- session_retention.rs: as u64 → u64::try_from for retention calculations
- tantivy_ingest.rs: as i64 → i64::try_from for document field conversions
- tantivy_query.rs: as i64 → i64::try_from for query parameter casting
- wire_protocol.rs: as i64 → wrapping_neg() for negative offset handling

These casts were previously safe on 64-bit platforms but could panic or
produce incorrect results on edge-case inputs (e.g. negative durations,
timestamps near epoch boundaries). The try_from pattern provides explicit
fallback values instead of silently wrapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
